function.message: I could not complete this inbox request because one of the explicitly listed OCR target files is missing. The inbox item specifies five exact files, but only four are available/readable in the workspace. Please confirm the correct fifth path (or add the missing file), and I can process all listed items together.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox-processing rule that explicit inbox file lists are exact and complete and must not be substituted; applied clarification rule to avoid partial completion when required file is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md requires OCR of five specific files. Four listed purchase files were successfully read, but the remaining listed target could not be found/read, and follow-up lookup in the purchases root did not locate it. Completing only four would violate the explicit-list completeness rule.
